title: NormSMP
description: This plugin adds a point system to the game with upgradable effects
body:
# NormSMP Plugin
This plugin adds a point system. When you kill someone, they drop a **Norm Point**. This item can be activated by pressing the right click button. You can use this point to upgrade in the /stats menu. You can access this menu by executing the command **/stats**. You can change the default point amount in the **config.yml** file.

# Things you can customize:
- Every string
- Every item name
- Every item lore
- The action bar

# Admin commands:
- /norm reload **reloads the config**
- /norm getitem *item* **In the current version, you can only use the "point" item**
